provenance_note: June 16 refresh that expands representative ParaView movie staging to the richest available retained time histories, prefers continuation-stage sources when they contain more times than the registered source root, and reruns the representative movie path in explicit high-resolution PNG-frame mode.
source_root_resolution_policy: Use the registered source_root by default.
If a matching continuation-stage tree under jadyn_runs/**/case_stage has more numeric times, prefer that richer source root for reconstruction staging.
Current known richer continuation roots include Salt 1 Jin, Salt 2 validation, and Salt 4 Jin.
runtime_notes: The OpenFOAM 13 bootstrap must be sourced outside strict pipefail mode because its bashrc alias setup is not safe under set -euo pipefail.
After reconstruction, the batch wrapper must purge modules and reload gcc/11.2.0 + impi/19.0.9 + paraview_osmesa/5.13.3 before invoking pvbatch.
Representative movie output is currently being refreshed in frames-only mode at 3840x2160 per frame.
